message:
feat: add toCode() decompiler — converts QueryDescriptor back to fluent DataFrame builder code

Following drawmode's pattern: code as the optimal serialization format for LLM context windows.
~50x compression vs raw JSON descriptors, readable, copy-pasteable TypeScript.

- descriptorToCode(desc): standalone function, handles all 14 filter ops with shorthand
  methods (whereNull, whereIn, whereBetween, whereLike, etc.), aggregates, groupBy,
  joins, window functions, set operations, vector search, distinct, sort, limit/offset,
  version, cache, computed columns, pipe stages, subqueryIn
- DataFrame.toCode(): instance method (calls toDescriptor() then descriptorToCode())
- DataFrame.descriptorToCode: static method re-export
- Exported from both "querymode" and "querymode/local" entry points
- 39 tests covering all features, edge cases, round-trip, ordering, bigint, nested joins
